description: AgentVeil provides routed action-control for MCP and agent workflows: approval, redirect, block, and bounded evidence for configured tool paths. The AgentVeil MCP Toolbox exposes explicit AVP tools for Runtime Gate, receipts, audit checks, identity lookup, and advisory reputation; it does not intercept or gate other MCP tools. Use agentveil-mcp-proxy for downstream MCP tool-call control. Local/full toolbox mode exposes 20 tools; hosted read-only mode exposes 8 tools.
